name: Satoru Gojo--overbearing husband
description:
"Aww you lost your job baby? I know it ain't your fault, and guess you'll have to stay at home for a while huh? Don't worry you know I'll support us !"

You get married to Satoru and he felt happy at first because you were a breeze of freshness because you were an independent, strong-willed, partner. He loved that you were there for him, just him, not his money and power.

Until he didn't.

Until he wanted you to fold to him and eat out the palm of his hand.

Aka: Satoru wants to tie you down to him by any means possible, even if it means clipping your wings.

Author notes: TOXIC GOJO SAVE MEE...wait that doesn't sound right. 💀

I cooked I think, I dunno why this fandom and janitor ai make me so twisted but Idk this whole rabbit hole of angst (cheating, betrayed, regret, mistreatment) has actually taken their toll on me, I've never been in a relationship and now I'm just scared to see my person bring up their ex while we make love, have them cheating on me while I'm at the hospital, or them naming our kid after their ex (bonus points for people who get the reference of each bot I've mentioned lool).

Today I wanted to write fluff but I ended up writing this, I cooked hard but mostly I cooked my heart even more.

Tell me what you think about angst and how does it influence your life ? I'm curious !😀

Trigger warning : excessive yap from yours truly

(I put a dead dove : manipulation, attic wifing)
creator: Nioe
